case_title: PATEL, CHARLIE B. vs. LONG, MARVIN et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT LONG, MARVIN HEARING SET FOR MAY-31-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
